---
id: list-chats
title: "List chats"
description: "Retrieves a paginated list of chat objects in the given space. Chat objects are containers for chat messages; use the returned chat IDs with the GetChatMessages endpoint to fetch their messages."
sidebar_label: "List chats"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "get api-method"
info_path: docs/reference/2025-11-08/anytype-api
custom_edit_url: null
---

import MethodEndpoint from "@theme/ApiExplorer/MethodEndpoint";
import ParamsDetails from "@theme/ParamsDetails";
import RequestSchema from "@theme/RequestSchema";
import StatusCodes from "@theme/StatusCodes";
import OperationTabs from "@theme/OperationTabs";
import TabItem from "@theme/TabItem";
import Heading from "@theme/Heading";
import Translate from "@docusaurus/Translate";

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"List chats"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/v1/spaces/{space_id}/chats"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Retrieves a paginated list of chat objects in the given space. Chat objects are containers for chat messages; use the returned chat IDs with the GetChatMessages endpoint to fetch their messages.
Supports dynamic filtering via query parameters (see ListObjects for the full filter grammar).

  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
>

</Heading>
